channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ICE Confirms El Paso Detention Facility to Remain Open with Upgraded Operations Under New Contractor
item.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has confirmed that Camp East Montana, a detention facility located in El Paso, Texas, will remain operational despite previous reports suggesting it could fac...

item.title: Study Reveals How Neutron Star Mergers Spread Precious Metals Across the Universe
item.description: Astrophysicists have studied a cosmic event that took place 8.5 billion light-years away, where two neutron stars collided, producing a short gamma-ray burst known as GRB 230906A. These binary neutron...

item.title: Crikey seeks multimedia editor to expand video and audio journalism
item.description: Crikey, Australia’s leading independent news outlet, is on the hunt for a skilled multimedia editor to join its dynamic team. Following a successful 2025, which saw the launch of an election podcast a...

item.title: Tel Aviv residents hold dance parties in bomb shelters amid ongoing missile threats from Iran
item.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel's vibrant coastal city known for its lively nightlife, young people have adapted to the realities of the war with Iran by transforming designated bomb shelters into impromptu dance...

item.title: Drone attack targets US diplomatic support centre in Baghdad amid escalating US-Israel-Iran conflict
item.description: A drone struck the Baghdad Diplomatic Support Center, a key US logistical hub near Baghdad International Airport, as part of retaliatory actions by Iranian-backed Iraqi militias under the Islamic Resi...

item.title: Kerala Government Recognises Pentecostal Churches as Official Christian Denomination
item.description: The Kerala cabinet has approved in principle the recognition of Pentecostal churches as an official Christian denomination. This decision follows a meeting where a delegation of Pentecostal church lea...

item.title: Fuel Supply Stable Despite Global Energy Concerns, Minister Goyal Confirms
item.description: Minister Piyush Goyal has assured that there is no shortage of fuel in the country, even as global energy markets remain uncertain. He highlighted that India has sufficient reserves and supply chains ...

item.title: Almira Muhlach expresses joy over daughter Alyssa’s engagement with Chris Young
item.description: Veteran actress Almira Muhlach is beaming with happiness after her daughter, Alyssa Muhlach, announced her engagement to American singer Chris Young. In interviews and social media posts, Almira expre...

item.title: Pakistan Auto Sales Up 43% in 8MFY26 Amid Sector Variations
item.description: In February 2026, Pakistan's auto sales for cars, SUVs, pickups, and vans reached 17,121 units, marking a 42 percent year-on-year increase but a 26 percent month-on-month decline due to high base effe...

item.title: Nunavut MP Lori Idlout joins Liberal caucus, prompting NDP concerns over floor-crossing
item.description: Lori Idlout, the Member of Parliament for Nunavut, has officially left the New Democratic Party (NDP) to join the Liberal Party caucus. This move strengthens the Liberal government as it moves closer ...

item.title: IEC urges early proclamation of local government election date to aid voter registration
item.description: The Electoral Commission of South Africa (IEC) has called for an early announcement of the upcoming local government elections, emphasising that delays could complicate voter registration and election...

item.title: Medical Experts Explain Why Brazilian Butt Lift (BBL) Is the Riskiest Cosmetic Surgery
item.description: The Brazilian Butt Lift (BBL) don turn one of the most popular cosmetic surgeries wey people dey rush go do all over the world, but according to doctors, e still be the most dangerous one. The procedu...

item.title: Rajasthan relaxes two-child eligibility rule for local body election candidates
item.description: The Rajasthan government has announced a significant change in its eligibility criteria for local body elections. Under the new rule, the two-child norm, which previously restricted candidates with mo...

item.title: Government Institutes Third-Party Audit to Ensure Proper Implementation of Austerity Measures
item.description: ISLAMABAD/KARACHI: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has instructed all federal ministries and divisions to fully comply with the recently announced austerity plan, amid economic challenges stemming from ...

item.title: China outlines five-year plan targeting high-tech exports and domestic economic balance
item.description: China is set to release the final version of its latest five-year plan, aiming for the lowest GDP growth target in 25 years, between 4.5% and 5%. The slowdown reflects both domestic economic challenge...

item.title: South Africa Faces Potential Fuel Shortages as Middle East Conflict Disrupts Oil Routes
item.description: A growing conflict in the Middle East is starting to affect South Africa’s fuel supply, prompting warnings about possible shortages and steep price increases in April 2026. According to reports, Engen...

item.title: Matt Canavan becomes National Party leader as Iranian women are granted asylum in Australia
item.description: During a lively session of federal question time, multiple political developments captured national attention. Matt Canavan has been elected leader of the National Party, signalling a shift for the pa...

item.title: Kenya Expands Irrigation Projects to Strengthen Food Security and Farmer Productivity
item.description: Kenya is pushing hard to increase its irrigated land, with plans to cover over one million acres. Currently, the country has around 763,000 acres under irrigation, but the National Irrigation Sector I...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens Edge Out Toronto Maple Leafs 3-1 in Hard-Fought Game
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens secured a 3-1 win over the Toronto Maple Leafs, showcasing a remarkable performance across all three scoring lines. After a shaky start in the first period, the Canadiens quickl...

item.title: VP Sara reminds Filipinos to uphold justice and sovereignty on Rodrigo Duterte arrest anniversary
item.description: On the first anniversary of former President Rodrigo Duterte's arrest and transfer to The Hague, Vice President Sara Duterte urged the Filipino people to remain vigilant against any attempts to manipu...
